chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-468 of 2026 (Talha Rasheed Khan v Province of Sindh & others) ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing of case. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1748 of 2026. 2. For hearing of main case. Date of hearing and order:-12.03.2026. Mr. Zeeshan Qureshi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. --------------- At the outset, learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of the petition with liberty to approach the Special Court for Cooperative Societies under the Cooperative Laws. The request seems to be reasonable and acceded to subject to all just exceptions as provided under the law, and this petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
